name: healer-kingdom-heal-sweep
description: Daily kingdom-wide heal sweep. Walks all entity dirs, detects orphan frontmatter (relates-to: refs to non-existent paths), deprecated frontmatter keys (related-briefs:→relates-to:, specs:→related-specs:), and broken trust-bond refs. Emits one finding event per anomaly. Writes a dated summary report to <entity>/heals/YYYY-MM-DD-auto-sweep.md.
